title: Deal Overview
description: Explore the deal overview page to review metrics, activity timeline, and manage collaborators for a deal.

steps.narration: The deal overview gives you a complete picture of the Meridian Dynamics engagement. At the top you can see the deal header with status, owner, and company information.
The metrics cards show your deal progress at a glance. Touches completed, days in pipeline, and last activity date help you gauge momentum without digging into details.
Scroll down to the activity timeline. Each entry represents a touch point or interaction, showing the type of engagement and when it happened.
Zoom in on a timeline entry to see the details. This pre-call briefing was completed on February 12th, giving the team research and discovery questions before the initial meeting.
The collaborator section shows who is working on this deal. Click to manage team members and add new collaborators.
Add a collaborator by selecting from your team. This gives them visibility into the deal and lets them contribute to the preparation workflow.
The updated collaborator list now shows all team members with access. Each person can independently run touches and review generated content.
At the bottom, the deal status area lets you take action on the deal. You can update the status, view generation history, or start a new touch.
